ddls:
CREATE TABLE "companies" (
  "company_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each company */,
  "ticker_symbol" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company */,
  "gics_sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GICS sector the company belongs to */,
  "gics_sub_industry_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GICS sub-industry the company belongs to */,
  "company_website" TEXT /* URL of the company's official website */,
  "ceo_name" TEXT /* Name of the CEO */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the company was founded */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the company's headquarters */,
  "market_capitalization" TEXT /* Current market capitalization of the company */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the company's data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("company_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_gics_sub_industry_id FOREIGN KEY ("gics_sub_industry_id") REFERENCES gics_sub_industries ("sub_industry_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_companies_gics_sector_id FOREIGN KEY ("gics_sector_id") REFERENCES gics_sectors ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the report belongs to */,
  "fiscal_year" TEXT /* Fiscal year of the report */,
  "period_ending" TEXT /* Date the period ends */,
  "total_revenue" TEXT /* Total revenue of the company */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" TEXT /* Cost of goods sold */,
  "sales_general_admin" TEXT /* Sales, general, and administrative expenses */,
  "research_development" TEXT /* Research and development expenses */,
  "other_operating_items" TEXT /* Other operating items */,
  "operating_income" TEXT /* Operating income of the company */,
  "net_income" TEXT /* Net income of the company */,
  "earnings_per_share" REAL /* Earnings per share (EPS) */,
  "dividends_per_share" REAL /* Dividends per share */,
  "cash_flow_from_operations" TEXT /* Cash flow from operating activities */,
  "cash_flow_from_investing" TEXT /* Cash flow from investing activities */,
  "cash_flow_from_financing" TEXT /* Cash flow from financing activities */,
  "total_assets" TEXT /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" TEXT /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "shareholders_equity" TEXT /* Shareholders' equity */,
  "debt_to_equity_ratio" REAL /* Debt-to-equity ratio */,
  "return_on_assets" REAL /* Return on assets (ROA) */,
  "return_on_equity" REAL /* Return on equity (ROE) */,
  "price_to_earnings_ratio" REAL /* Price-to-earnings ratio (P/E) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the financial report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gics_sectors" (
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GICS sector */,
  "sector_name" TEXT /* Name of the GICS sector */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sector */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sector data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sector_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gics_sub_industries" (
  "sub_industry_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each GICS sub-industry */,
  "sub_industry_name" TEXT /* Name of the GICS sub-industry */,
  "sector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the GICS sector the sub-industry belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the GICS sub-industry */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the sub-industry data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sub_industry_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "company_id" INTEGER /* ID of the company the user belongs to (if applicable) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last logged in */,
  "last_password_change" TEXT /* Date and time when the user last changed their password */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_company_id FOREIGN KEY ("company_id") REFERENCES companies ("company_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used for access */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access attempt (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "custom_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each custom report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the custom report */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "query" TEXT /* SQL query used to generate the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the custom report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the custom report was last updated */,
  "is_shared" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is shared with others */,
  "is_public" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the report is public */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_custom_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom report being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the report */,
  "shared_with_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the report is shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was shared */,
  "is_read_only" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the shared report is read-only */,
  "share_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the share expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_shared_with_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_shares_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES custom_reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the custom report the comment is on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date when the comment was made */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment is private */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the comment has been resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES custom_reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "action_type" TEXT /* Type of action (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  "action_date" TEXT /* Date when the action was performed */,
  "details" TEXT /* Details of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the action was performed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the action (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
